title: Sweetmagictinker
description: SweetMagicTinker is a Minecraft Forge mod that adds cross-mod integration between SweetMagic and Tinkers' Construct 3, and currently introduces a new tool: the Magic Wand.
body: SweetMagicTinker is a Minecraft Forge mod that adds cross-mod integration between SweetMagic and Tinkers' Construct 3, and currently introduces a new tool: the Magic Staff.
